summary: Frontend-only regression run completed on public preview URL for Home/live-summary/player-profile changes. Core route matrix now renders correctly for Home/Schedule/Groups/Bracket/Predictor/Compare, but player-profile route is not rendering on deployed app. Live-summary/event-player link flows were only partially verifiable due absent live-summary/event-link elements at runtime.

ui_bugs.issue: Direct player route (#/player/Algeria/Oussama%20Benbot) renders blank main content; neither player page marker nor not-found marker appears.

integration_issues.issue: Could not fully validate runtime behavior because no home live-summary cards/links were present in tested session (no live matches/events surfaced).
No event-player links appeared in selected match panel during run, so click-through verification to /player route remained blocked.

issues: Player rows are div/onClick (modal-based) and not deep-linkable anchors, reducing direct-route testability and shareability.

action_items: Fix deployed player-profile route rendering on public preview so #/player/:team/:player mounts PlayerProfile and shows either profile or not-found state.
Revalidate deployment artifact/version parity; source shows route/page present but live preview behavior is inconsistent for /player route.
Retest during at least one live match (or with controlled fixture) to verify home live-summary block visibility and summary/event player-link targets/new-tab behavior end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx and LiveMatchPanel.jsx correctly point player links to /player/:team/:player with target='_blank' in source.
App.jsx includes /player/:team/:player route and lazy PlayerProfile import, so deployed blank route indicates runtime/deployment mismatch or silent render failure.
SquadDetail still uses modal-only player rows (no player anchors), so that page does not validate the new player-profile navigation path.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL tested: https://wc2026-nine-sepia.vercel.app. Route matrix for major tabs now looked correct in this run, unlike older iteration_5 route-shift report. Remaining blocker is player route rendering (blank content on direct #/player URL). Live-summary and event-feed player links were not present at runtime due no surfaced live summary/events, so those acceptance checks remain pending a live-data window or controlled fixture.
rca of the issue: Repro: open https://wc2026-nine-sepia.vercel.app/#/player/Algeria/Oussama%20Benbot and inspect for [data-testid='player-profile-page'] or [data-testid='player-profile-not-found']; both absent while page appears blank. Code-level review shows route and component exist, suggesting deployment/runtime inconsistency or silent render crash path not surfaced in .error selectors. Mitigation: verify deployed bundle matches current source, add explicit fallback/no-match handling around player route, and rerun targeted route checks. MOCKED APIs: NONE.
